name: data-warehouse-analytics-training-dataset-builder
description: T182 TrainingDatasetBuilder — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Tenant-scoped datasets. F423 IPIIMaskingService runs before dataset export. featureCount and rowCount validated before emit.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: F423 PII masking before export, featureCount and rowCount validated (> 0) before emit, tenant-scoped datasets
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + pii-masking-before-export + feature-count-validation + training-dataset + tenant-scoped-dataset patterns for T182

Break T182 into: consume queue event → load tenant dataset config → query DATABASE (tenant-scoped) → F423 mask PII fields → validate featureCount > 0 and rowCount > 0 → storeDocument(dataset) → emit DatasetBuilt

Generate training-dataset-builder.service.ts — queue consumer. F423 IPIIMaskingService runs BEFORE dataset is assembled for export. featureCount and rowCount are validated: if either === 0 emit DatasetBuildFailed with EMPTY_DATASET code. Tenant-scoped from ALS. NEVER export dataset with unmasked PII. DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE emit.
Named check validation: pii_masking_before_assembly, feature_count_validated_positive, row_count_validated_positive, tenant_scoped_dataset, empty_dataset_error_handled
Score generated code 0-100 against T182 iron rules: PII masking order, featureCount/rowCount validation, tenant isolation, empty dataset error
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=pii-masking-first+count-validated+empty-dataset-error, rejected=pii-masking-after-assembly OR zero-count-accepted OR cross-tenant-dataset. curriculumTier=1.
